channel.title: GitHub APL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of APL in GitHub

item.title: Dyalog/dyalog-tube-ws
item.description: Source for building the dfns tube planner workspace (tube.dws)

item.title: Dyalog/library-core
item.description: Core application development library for Dyalog APL

item.title: Dyalog/qSE
item.description: Initialisation of ⎕SE, including source code that ends up somewhere in ⎕SE, and code to get it there.

item.title: Dyalog/link
item.description: Source code for Link – the built-in component that enables the use of text files as the primary storage mechanism for APL source code

item.title: Dyalog/conga-apl
item.description: Source code, build and test scripts used to build and test Dyalog APL's core communication library, Conga (conga.dws)

item.title: Dyalog/samples-conga
item.description: TCP communication samples using Dyalog APL's core communication library, Conga

item.title: Dyalog/HttpCommand
item.description: A utility to manage HTTP requests from APL

item.title: Dyalog/library-conga
item.description: HTTP tools based on Dyalog APL's core communication library, Conga

item.title: Dyalog/isolate
item.description: Source to build isolate.dws, the futures and isolates workspace deliviered with Dyalog APL
